data-reader/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 21.
data-reader/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer compiler plugin versions; using 'release' ensures correct module path and annotation processing behavior for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in newer JDKs and do not enforce module path compatibility; 'release' is required for proper cross-compilation or targeting JDK 21 features.
Without this, the compiler may default to an older version or fail to recognize Java 21 syntax if not overridden by plugin config.
Without this, the generated bytecode may be incompatible with JDK 21 runtime or fail to utilize new class file versions.

tetrad-gui/src/main/java/edu/cmu/tetrada.general_idea: Replace deprecated no-arg newInstance() with getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance() for object instantiation.
tetrad-gui/src/main/java/edu/cmu/tetrada.why_exists: Method Class.newInstance() was deprecated in Java 9 and removed in Java 21, causing a compile error.

tetrad-gui/src/main/java/edu/cmu/tetrada.general_idea: Replace deprecated no-arg newInstance() with getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance() for object instantiation.
tetrad-gui/src/main/java/edu/cmu/tetrada.why_exists: Method Class.newInstance() was deprecated in Java 9 and removed in Java 21, causing a compile error.
